title: Aether 1.0.31
notes: Auto-update restart fix, hidden update installer, safer update package handling, container version picker fixes, and distinct red/purple themes.
changes: Fixed PyInstaller python312.dll startup failure after launcher update.
Apply update without opening a console window.
Reset PyInstaller environment before restarting the updated launcher.
Support local Windows paths while testing update packages.
Verify update package SHA-256 when the manifest provides it.
Allow mouse wheel scrolling in the Minecraft version dropdown.
Disable manual typing of Minecraft versions in container creation/editing.
Make red and purple themes visually distinct.
